name: Cauliflower & Ginger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the base of the cauliflower and discard any discolored outer leaves.
2. Cut the remaining leaves thinly and break the cauliflower into florets.
3. Wash and drain the cauliflower well.
4. Heat the oil in a soup pot and sauté the cauliflower and onion over medium heat, covered, for 10 minutes. Do not allow to brown.
5. Add ginger, stock, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Cool slightly.
7. Blend the cooled soup in a blender or food processor until smooth.
8. Return the blended soup to the pot and heat until warmed through.
9. Serve immediately.
